top_signals.title: Securitize becomes first to debut shares on NYSE and onchain, but it won’t be the last
top_signals.summary: President Brett Redfearn said the firm is in discussions to tokenize other IPOs "definitely ... within the next year.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
